# Chapter 9: Linear algebra  (~110 pp)
- 9.1 Vector spaces (12)
- 9.2 Matrices as linear maps (15)
- 9.3 Solving linear systems: Gaussian elimination, LU, QR (18)
- 9.4 Determinants (10)
- 9.5 Inner products, norms, orthogonality (12)
- 9.6 Projection, least squares (15)
- 9.7 Conditioning and numerical sensitivity (12)
- 9.8 Failure section: ill-conditioned systems and what to refuse to solve (16)

**Archetype**: optimisation, uncertainty. **Project**: fit a polynomial to data three ways (normal equations, QR, SVD) and compare conditioning. **Exercises**: 40.
